---
name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**URL tested**
The URL you audited when the bug occurred.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include score if relevant).

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots.

**Environment**
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Self-hosted or live site: [e.g. agentlighthouse.burakgider.com]
